elements.name: Description
texts: The entry for the River Derg in an 1842 Irish gazetteer

elements.name: Source
texts: The gazetteer of Ireland, containing the latest information from the most authentic sources, p. 312

elements.name: Contributor
texts: Digitised by Google, sponsored by University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, archived on Hathi Trust digital library

elements.name: Text
texts: "DERG, a stream which issues from Lough Derg, and enters the Strule river on the high road between Newtown Stewart and Strabane."
